notices.title: Admissions Open for Academic Session 2026-27
notices.content: Online registration for Classes VI to XII has started. Eligible candidates can submit their forms online. Entrance exams will be held in July.
notices.author: Principal Desk

notices.title: Scholarship Scheme Notice for UP Board Students
notices.content: Applications are invited for the Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme. Students with >75% attendance and meeting income criteria can submit documents before July 15.
notices.author: Office Registry

notices.title: Annual Sports Meet 2026 Schedule
notices.content: The Annual Sports Meet is scheduled to be held from November 10th to November 14th. Registrations for athletic events open on October 1st.
notices.author: Sports Dept

notices.title: Quarterly Examination Syllabus Published
notices.content: Syllabus for the first quarterly examinations (Classes VI-XII) has been updated in the downloads section. Please download your respective class files.
notices.author: Academic Coordinator

notices.title: UP Board High School and Intermediate Toppers Felicitated
notices.content: Congratulations to our students who scored outstanding percentages in the recent Board Examinations. Best wishes for their future endeavors.
notices.author: Principal Desk

events.title: Annual Science Exhibition
events.description: Inter-school science model competition showcasing innovative student projects.

events.title: Independence Day Celebration
events.description: Flag hoisting ceremony, patriotic speech, cultural performances, and sweets distribution.

events.title: Teacher's Day Special Assembly
events.description: Cultural program organized by senior secondary students to honor teachers.

downloads.title: Class X UP Board Sample Question Papers (Mathematics)

messages.subject: Admission Inquiry
messages.message: Hello, I want to know if there are seats available in Class XI Commerce stream for my ward. What is the process?
